biography:
Shameik Alti Moore (born May 4, 1995) is an American actor and musician. He made his lead acting debut in Dope (2015) and is best known for voicing Miles Morales / Spider-Man in the animated film Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse(2018) and its sequel Across the Spider-Verse (2023) and for portraying Wu-Tang Clan member Raekwon in the Hulu series Wu-Tang: An American Saga.
